register.note: Forced 0 — hero.png opens on H1 + prose + metadata card + stepper with no graphic, where ciechanowski-watch/00 makes a rendered watch the page's face.
Forced 0 — no hero exists to depict the threshold/boundary, whereas seeing-theory-regression/01 puts the residual squares (the mechanism) directly in the picture.

see-viewport's strip self-labels (t=0.50, predict 0/1, TP/FP/FN/TN, the precision/recall panel), but it is one static state and the 'why' still lives in left prose, where distill-momentum/02 writes the governing condition into every small-multiple.

Palette and soft cards are Distill-soft, but see-spine shows a large dead band with the matrix scattered to the lower-right and weak focal hierarchy, where ciechanowski-watch/02 holds one tight composed column.

run-viewport shows a draggable threshold driving a live matrix re-count (explanatory, the lab's edge), but steppability/easing are not verifiable from a static frame so no polish credit vs 3b1b-gradient-descent/02.

Class hues (blue=1, amber=0) hold across strip and cells and error semantics carry into prose ('95% accuracy' tinted rose under 'SYMPTOM · IT BROKE'), matching r2d3-trees/00's disciplined binding; only the pale-on-pale confusion-cell numerals are borderline AA.

hero.note: A hero would need the threshold strip + visible boundary + live confusion matrix promoted to full width above the prose, self-labeled and thumbnail-legible.

assessment.note: The closing transfer-metric item is kind:transfer but is answered by three MCQ options, so the transfer is not an interaction or open prompt.

blocking: Add a full-width composed hero (threshold strip with visible boundary + live confusion matrix), self-labeled and thumbnail-legible, to clear the two forced-0 hero dimensions.
Consolidate the see-spine layout to remove the empty lower-right dead band that holds atmosphere at 2.
Convert the closing transfer item from a 3-option MCQ to an interaction or open prompt.
Raise confusion-cell numeral contrast (blue-on-pale-blue, rose-on-pale-rose) to AA.
verdict.summary: Real interactivity, in-graphic labels, and color grammar (colour=3), but the missing composed hero forces two dimensions to 0 and the page reads as a clean blog post with a figure — does not clear register 3.
